ingredients.item:
POTATOES
31/3 pounds (1.5 kg) russet or Yukon gold potatoes, peeled and cut into large pieces (roughly into eighths)
¼ cup (55 g) salted butter
ingredients.original:
POTATOES
31/3 pounds (1.5 kg) russet or Yukon gold potatoes, peeled and cut into large pieces (roughly into eighths)
¼ cup (55 g) salted butter

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon kosher salt, plus more if needed
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon kosher salt, plus more if needed

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons finely chopped fresh thyme (or substitute with 2 tablespoons dried oregano or basil)
ingredients.original: 3 tablespoons finely chopped fresh thyme (or substitute with 2 tablespoons dried oregano or basil)

ingredients.item: 1 Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C) and place a rack in the middle.
ingredients.original: 1 Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C) and place a rack in the middle.

ingredients.item: 2 TO MAKE THE EGGPLANT: Place the eggplant in a single layer on a large, rimmed sheet pan lined with parchment paper and sprinkle with ½ teaspoon salt and drizzle with the olive oil. (Use two sheet pans if necessary.) Bake for 40 minutes, or until golden and softened.
ingredients.original: 2 TO MAKE THE EGGPLANT: Place the eggplant in a single layer on a large, rimmed sheet pan lined with parchment paper and sprinkle with ½ teaspoon salt and drizzle with the olive oil. (Use two sheet pans if necessary.) Bake for 40 minutes, or until golden and softened.

ingredients.item: 3 TO MAKE THE POTATOES: Place the potatoes in a large pot over high heat and cover with cold water. Bring to a boil and cook until very soft, 20 to 25 minutes. Drain and leave the potatoes in the pot. Add the butter, 1 teaspoon salt, ¼ teaspoon pepper, and 1 cup (240 ml) milk. Mash the potatoes using a potato masher or ricer until creamy and fluffy.
ingredients.original: 3 TO MAKE THE POTATOES: Place the potatoes in a large pot over high heat and cover with cold water. Bring to a boil and cook until very soft, 20 to 25 minutes. Drain and leave the potatoes in the pot. Add the butter, 1 teaspoon salt, ¼ teaspoon pepper, and 1 cup (240 ml) milk. Mash the potatoes using a potato masher or ricer until creamy and fluffy.

ingredients.item: 4 WHILE THE EGGPLANT AND POTATOES COOK, MAKE THE FILLING: In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat. Add the onion and cook, stirring often, until softened and translucent, 5 to 7 minutes. Add the garlic and cook for another minute, stirring often. Add the ground beef and cook, breaking it up into small pieces with a wooden spoon, for 5 to 7 minutes, until browned. Add the salt, pepper, thyme, and onion and garlic powders and oregano and stir. Cook for 2 to 3 minutes until the meat juices dry up. Add the passata and stir to combine. Remove from the heat.
ingredients.original: 4 WHILE THE EGGPLANT AND POTATOES COOK, MAKE THE FILLING: In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat. Add the onion and cook, stirring often, until softened and translucent, 5 to 7 minutes. Add the garlic and cook for another minute, stirring often. Add the ground beef and cook, breaking it up into small pieces with a wooden spoon, for 5 to 7 minutes, until browned. Add the salt, pepper, thyme, and onion and garlic powders and oregano and stir. Cook for 2 to 3 minutes until the meat juices dry up. Add the passata and stir to combine. Remove from the heat.

ingredients.item: 5 In a 9 x 13-inch (23 x 33 cm) baking dish, layer all the baked eggplant to cover the base of the dish, overlapping the pieces as necessary. Spread all the beef mixture evenly on top. Spoon the mashed potatoes on top, adding large spoonfuls to cover the surface, then use a flat or offset spatula to smooth the potatoes into an even layer. Ensure all the edges are sealed with the potato.
ingredients.original: 5 In a 9 x 13-inch (23 x 33 cm) baking dish, layer all the baked eggplant to cover the base of the dish, overlapping the pieces as necessary. Spread all the beef mixture evenly on top. Spoon the mashed potatoes on top, adding large spoonfuls to cover the surface, then use a flat or offset spatula to smooth the potatoes into an even layer. Ensure all the edges are sealed with the potato.

ingredients.item: 6 Use a fork and run it all along the surface of the potatoes in rows, pressing down gently to make grooves. Bake for 30 minutes. Spray the surface of the baking dish with oil, then broil for 2 minutes to brown the top slightly. Let cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
ingredients.original: 6 Use a fork and run it all along the surface of the potatoes in rows, pressing down gently to make grooves. Bake for 30 minutes. Spray the surface of the baking dish with oil, then broil for 2 minutes to brown the top slightly. Let cool for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
